case_title: NEPOMUCENO, BALBINA et al VS MISSION CHEVRON AUTO SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, DENNIS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEPOMUCENO, BALBINA MCKAY, RAINY AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION CHEVRON AUTO SERVICE CHANG, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEPOMUCENO, BALBINA MCKAY, RAINY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISSION CHEVRON AUTO SERVICE CHANG, DENNIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
